name: Conflict Arbitrator
next_task: Architecture design for overlay PWA + legal/liability review required before any build starts.
current_focus: AI-powered mediation overlay that works across any communication platform. Multi-model consensus for fairness. Local-first privacy architecture.
completion_checks: Overlay PWA designed and architecture approved
Legal review of 'mediation' terminology completed — must be labeled 'AI-assisted conflict resolution'
Two-party consent architecture hardened before any voice recording feature ships
Abuse detection safety protocols defined before public launch
anti_drift_notes: This is NOT a therapy replacement. The overlay must never position itself as a replacement for licensed mediators. Crisis routing to professional resources must be instant and unambiguous.

decision_debt.description: Legal review of 'mediation' terminology in different jurisdictions required
Two-party consent laws (California + others) must be addressed in architecture
Abusive relationship safety protocols not yet specified
Voice recording legal requirements not yet mapped per state/country
